arms_mandatory_baselines: factorial verifier-OFF cells at BOTH sizes for all three mediums — the interaction's four-cell legs (nl is the mandatory content-matched control; a structured arm beating an incomparable NL system is NOT the M2 sign)
factorial verifier-ON cells (structured mediums only; NL has no IR-hard islands — PROPOSED-ASM-1145) emitting the RT-7a verifier_engagement block

ttc-deflator: 360M-NL + self-consistency majority vote, N cost-matched at runtime to the FIXED pre-registered reference cell R2/gloss/verifier-on (never post-hoc best) — the K2' purchased-compute kill's instrument; the corrected replacement for CASC-0's arithmetically impossible A2 contract (PROPOSED-ASM-1148); a 1.7B-NL+TTC reference MAY be co-reported at its own cost, never as a matched baseline

deranged-control: R2/gloss/verifier-on against a seed-pinned Sattolo derangement of the atomic relation types (map recorded) — identical retry topology and cost, closure content decoupled from items; house control, REPORTED-ONLY (PROPOSED-ASM-1152)

dependent_vars.definition: final constrained answer key == the ENGINE-derived gold key (engine-derived by construction; SELF-AUTHORED rider; the scoring rule for every endpoint)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct

dependent_vars.definition: measured prefill-token ratio structured-medium/NL on the same items (converts the CASC/1 ESTIMATED ledger entry to MEASURED)
dependent_vars.name: rho_in

dependent_vars.definition: measured flops(verifier-on)/flops(verifier-off) - 1 per structured medium at R2
dependent_vars.name: retry_overhead_r

dependent_vars.definition: F0 section 3.3 vector per cell; verifier CPU metered at the pinned rate; the binding cost figures for the co-primary's cost condition and the K2' matching gate
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger; store = facts.jsonl + composition-table.json bytes
dependent_vars.name: memory

n_planned._kernel_note: kernel-v0/molecules-v0 pinned VERBATIM from the f2b-transfer frozen record (PROPOSED-ASM-1153): the kernel instance whose authored-content value the f2b line measured and whose authoring style the gloss medium naturalises; NOT read by the runner (d-casc0 is self-contained)

assumptions.claim: CASC-0' framing, class, factor set, endpoints and kills adopted verbatim from cascade-synthesis section 3; renderer excluded; G2 oracle-diagnostic; no W1 claim [PROPOSED-ASM-1140, PROPOSED-ASM-1141]
medium definitions + pinned rendering templates; gloss is explicator-authored kernel-STYLE Option-A per-relation records (ASM-1158 check executed 2026-07-11; poc/casc-0/kernel-coverage.md)
corpus generator, composition table and closed-world stipulations; single-draw rule [PROPOSED-ASM-1143]
anti-oracle verifier contract (intermediates only, k=2) [PROPOSED-ASM-1144]; verifier-on restricted to structured mediums [PROPOSED-ASM-1145]

primary at verifier-off; verifier-on interaction secondary [PROPOSED-ASM-1146]; NI margin 0.05 DRAFT + Holm-2 co-primary [PROPOSED-ASM-1147]; TTC deflator protocol + 0.30 match band [PROPOSED-ASM-1148]; K1'/K2'/K3' wordings binding [PROPOSED-ASM-1149]
assumptions.note: every DECISION in this record cites its PROPOSED-ASM-1140..1159 id; the coordinator registers the block append-only at freeze

assumptions.claim: all cells stock (tuning symmetry at T_k=0; adding tuning re-labels the run an informative screen in the prereg itself) [PROPOSED-ASM-1150]; statistics constants [PROPOSED-ASM-1151]; deranged house control [PROPOSED-ASM-1152]; image/model/kernel pin reuse [PROPOSED-ASM-1153]; budget contract [PROPOSED-ASM-1154]; R2 rung naming extension [PROPOSED-ASM-1155]; instrument-gate set [PROPOSED-ASM-1156]; engine-derived gold scope [PROPOSED-ASM-1157]

context this record probes, restated strictly in-envelope: f2b-transfer effect_size +0.2507 on blind external gold with noninferiority_vs_r3 FALSE (PASS-PENDING-AUDIT; registry/verdicts/f2b-transfer.json); DECONF-A1 C_dec = 1.0 (runtime structure inert at the pinned checker seam; exploratory); nsk1 text-delivered grounding net-harmful at its scope; m0b kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at molecules-v0 on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance (NOT general coverage) — the corrected M2 register: untested directly, adverse-leaning neighbours

ASM-1078 (M2, the reasoner-shrink bet) — resolver reassigned to THIS record's primary endpoint; never a premise [PROPOSED-ASM-1159]; the e2e composition with the F front-end is published only as a product of tagged quantities

fresh-runs: every cell is a fresh final-phase run under this record's prereg_hash; no logged row of any other experiment is consumed as an arm output; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend (expected decision: proceed — no prior experiment has run these arms on d-casc0, which does not exist in any earlier log)

n_planned.corpus: data/d-casc0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1143): seed-pinned generator dcasc0/1|casc-0|20260711 (single-draw rule), 400 CLUTRR-shaped depth-2/3/4 relation-composition items over self-authored family-world facts with ENGINE-derivable gold from a pinned composition table under stipulated closed-world assumptions (full siblings, no step/in-law, distinct persons; ambiguous compositions UNDEFINED and never generated); held-out compositions (eval depth-2 paths hash-disjoint from the exemplar path pool) AND held-out depths (exemplars depth-2 only); EVAL SET = the first per_arm_items=300 items in pinned rank order (rank-interleaved depths; prefix mix 75/113/112; floor 250, ERR_EVAL_FLOOR); kernel-coverage mapping of the relation concepts is a stipulated pre-freeze explicator check (PROPOSED-ASM-1158); the runner re-derives every item's states from the store and fail-closes on mismatch (ERR_ENGINE_GOLD)
n_planned.dropped_arms: renderer + fid_R (deferred rear-seam instrument per cascade-synthesis section 1.5 — removing it from the M2 probe removes a confound), 1.7B+TTC-at-matched-budget (the CASC-0 A2 contract, arithmetically impossible — replaced by the small-scale deflator), F front-end (NLB's subject; composed analytically after, tagged EXTRAPOLATION), PRM/kernel-as-text/d-ext/int4/RAG (their prior readings stand)

instrument_gates.engagement_gate: RT-7a made structural over factorial verifier-on cells: decidable_fraction >= 0.70 (decidable = items with >=1 intermediate hop, i.e. depth>=3 — 0.75 of the eval prefix) AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final answer differing from attempt 0; missing engagement block is itself a failure; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS/NULL (PROPOSED-ASM-1156)
instrument_gates.extraction_gate_na: P10 extraction gate NOT APPLICABLE: constrained key selection over pinned option sets makes extraction failure structurally impossible (PROPOSED-ASM-1156); structural fail-closed asserts (ERR_GOLD_SURFACE, ERR_ENGINE_GOLD, ERR_ORACLE_CHECK) replace it
instrument_gates.headroom_gate: acc(R2, nl, off; 3-seed mean) <= 0.85 else INSTRUMENT-INVALID: a saturated small-model NL baseline cannot measure a medium lift
instrument_gates.separation_gate: acc(R3,nl) - acc(R2,nl) >= 0.05 (3-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; gates ONLY the co-primary NI family membership (on failure the co-primary is unevaluable and NEVER counts as a fail; K1' then cannot fire and the verdict falls through fail-closed)
instrument_gates.ttc_match_gate: |flops(ttc cell) - flops(reference cell R2/gloss/verifier-on)| / flops(reference) <= 0.30 (DRAFT band: integer-N vote quantization bounds the achievable gap by ~0.5/N plus reference retry variance) else INSTRUMENT-INVALID — a mismatched deflator could let a purchased-compute win masquerade as a medium effect

n_planned.medium_aliases_binding: nl = naturalised-prose (content-matched NL, same pinned template protocol as the dialects); gloss = raw-kernel (Option-A structured kernel gloss: typed canonical clauses, explicit roles/directions, canonical labels+URNs, one claim per clause); plain = distilled (knull-grade plain typed dialect). The task's {raw-kernel / naturalised-prose / distilled} naming maps to {gloss / nl / plain}; the synthesis section-3 levels are authoritative [STIPULATED: PROPOSED-ASM-1142].
n_planned.power_note: n=300 items x 3 paired seeds is the f2b-replicate right-size class (P8 carry-over: ~0.9 one-sided power at absolute interaction delta ~0.10 for paired contrasts); the DRAFT power read is re-checked by the pinned analysis at freeze (cascade-synthesis: 'power sized by the pinned analysis script at freeze')
n_planned.protocol: IDENTICAL elicitation in every cell (only size/medium/verifier vary): per item the model asserts each intermediate cumulative relation rel(X0,Xt) (t=2..depth-1) as a constrained 7-option choice, each assertion appended to the context in the CELL'S OWN medium, then the final relation on the same 7-option gendered surface; constrained sequence-logprob decoding (attempt-0 argmax; retries/TTC samples seeded multinomial at SEED_BASE 20260711); prompt frames pinned in poc/casc-0/inputs/casc0-manifest.json; NL phrasings produced by the same pinned template protocol as the dialect renderings (content-matched; per-medium token counts MEASURED); gloss templates are explicator-authored kernel-STYLE Option-A per-relation records (ASM-1158 check executed 2026-07-11; poc/casc-0/kernel-coverage.md)
n_planned.statistics: hierarchical paired item bootstrap preserving pairing (one shared index stream across contrasts), B=10000, PRNG seed 20260711, BCa bounds; Holm within each pre-declared 2-member family: F-primary(casc-0) = {m2_sign_gloss, m2_sign_plain} (verifier-OFF interactions — PROPOSED-ASM-1146: the pure medium leg is primary so M4 never masquerades as M2), F-coprimary(casc-0) = {ni_gloss, ni_plain} (conditional on the separation gate); TOST margins pinned: attribution 0.05, M2-null 0.05; NI margin 0.05 (DRAFT, maintainer-adjustable AT FREEZE only — PROPOSED-ASM-1147/1151). Reported-only, never Holm, never verdict-bearing: verifier-on interactions, verifier main/size effects, deranged delta, seed signs, rho_in, retry overhead, cost ratios.
n_planned.verifier_contract: step-grain M4: the engine closure is derived from the AUTHORED STORE (facts + pinned composition table); the model's asserted INTERMEDIATE cumulative relations are checked as emitted (accept/reject; ANY rejection => resample the whole item, fixed k=2, final answer = last attempt, pre-declared); THE FINAL RELATION IS NEVER CHECKED — the anti-oracle rule (PROPOSED-ASM-1144): a final-hop check against engine-derivable gold would manufacture the oracle-structured win that killed CASC-0 (cascade-synthesis section 1.2); ERR_ORACLE_CHECK fail-closed in the runner

endpoints.test: THE M2 SIGN (cascade-synthesis section 3 endpoint 1, verbatim contrast): for m in {gloss, plain} at verifier OFF, inter_m = (acc(R2,m) - acc(R2,nl)) - (acc(R3,m) - acc(R3,nl)); paired item BCa bootstrap (B=10000, PRNG seed 20260711), one-sided alpha=0.05, Holm across the two structured mediums; reject iff the one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0 for at least one medium under Holm. M2 REQUIRES a positive size x medium interaction — a small-model gain the large model does not share — never merely a structured arm beating an incomparable NL system. [self-authored/kernel-STYLE/engine-derived-gold rider]

PRACTICAL SHRINK, the honest successor to f2b-transfer's failed noninferiority_vs_r3, now WITH an internal structured medium: acc(R2, m, verifier on) non-inferior to acc(R3, nl, off) at margin 0.05 (DRAFT pin, maintainer-adjustable at freeze) AND measured cost (formula FLOPs incl. metered verifier CPU) strictly below the R3-nl cell's; Holm across the two mediums; CONDITIONAL on the separation gate (else unevaluable: null, never a fail). [rider]

RT-7a engagement INSTRUMENT gate over factorial verifier-on cells: decidable_fraction >= 0.70 AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final-differs-attempt-0; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (verifier vacuity can never read as a hypothesis outcome)
headroom INSTRUMENT gate: acc(R2, nl, off; 3-seed mean) <= 0.85; a saturated baseline cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never NULL/FAIL

size-separation INSTRUMENT gate on NL (gates ONLY the co-primary NI family membership): acc(R3,nl) - acc(R2,nl) >= 0.05 AND one-sided 95% BCa LB > 0; on failure the co-primary leaves the family BEFORE any p-value comparison; the interaction primary always reads

TTC cost-match INSTRUMENT gate: measured relative flops gap of the deflator cell vs the FIXED reference cell (R2/gloss/verifier-on) <= 0.30; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (an unmatched deflator cannot arbitrate K2')

K2' (compute-deflator kill, treated as K1'): fires iff the primary rejected but NO Holm-passing medium beats the cost-matched 360M-NL+TTC deflator (one-sided 95% BCa LB of acc(R2,m,on) - acc(ttc) <= 0 for every passing m) — the medium effect is purchased compute

K3' (attribution, NON-FATAL, reported-only, never verdict-bearing): TOST equivalence of acc(R2,gloss,on) vs acc(R2,plain,on) within +/-0.05 => kernel-content attribution dead at scope (deflationary prior DISCLOSED: DECONF-A1 / a5 structural caveat / CODEVERT all point ~0 here); the kernel claim routes to knull-v2/A-F0 and any surviving family continues GENERIC

M4 at step grain, reported with BCa LB: verifier main effects per size and the verifier x size interaction (mean over structured mediums of on-off at R2 minus at R3); descriptive for the mechanism ledger, never verdict-bearing

deranged-closure house control (reported-only): acc(deranged) - acc(R2,gloss,on) point < 0 expected; a NON-collapse is a red flag for answer-key leakage through the elicitation protocol and quarantines the verifier secondaries pending investigation

realised rho_in per structured medium, retry overhead r, and the full per-cell KOT-COST vector: converts the CASC/1 section-3 ESTIMATED ledger entries (rho_in, r) to MEASURED and feeds the section-4 break-even inequality with measured inputs; gamma is NOT exercised (constrained answer surface; disclosed limitation)
NULL reading: BOTH verifier-off interactions TOST-equivalent to 0 within +/-0.05 => M2 measured-absent-at-scope (stronger than not-shown); feeds the NULL verdict rule

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any outcome: 2 host rungs (360M, 1.7B) license a SIGN, not a slope; every claim is scoped to <=1.7B stock instruct checkpoints, the self-authored d-casc0 relation-composition corpus (depths 2-4, held-out compositions/depths), ENGINE-DERIVED gold (never external adjudication — this record deliberately does not carry a ground-truth-independence claim; that residual belongs to the f2b-transfer line), the fixed k=2 retry budget, the constrained 7-option answer surface, and the three pinned medium renderings. A PASS licenses exactly ONE thing: the M2 sign exists at oracle-inbound, covered-corpus, <=1.7B scope — the gate to build the rear-seam renderer instrument and plan G3 behind G-NLB. It does NOT license: any W1/real-input claim (the F front-end is not exercised; ret_F 0.42-0.48 measured FAILs stand; the e2e projection acc ~ ret_F x core x fid_R is published only as a product of tagged quantities); any cost headline (parameter-ratio algebra is diagnostic-class; only the measured per-cell KOT-COST vectors bind); any kernel-attribution claim (K3''s separate read; deflationary prior disclosed); any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility 0.3542 at molecules-v0, one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily); any open-ended-generation claim (gamma unexercised; QA/reasoning shapes with compact cores only); any claim about naturalising FOR a model via tuning (all cells stock — this is the static PROMPTED case). A K1'/K2' FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it kills M2 at THIS scope, not the verify-retry mechanism as such (f2b-replicate's audited PASS and f2b-transfer's pending-audit readings stand exactly as issued).
hypotheses: H-M2 (load-bearing, the maintainer's static-case bet; EXTRAPOLATION ASM-1078 resolves here): a structured canonical medium carrying the authored content gives the SMALLER reasoner a task gain the larger reasoner does not share — operationalised as a positive size x medium interaction (R2 medium lift exceeding R3 medium lift vs content-matched NL) at verifier-off, for at least one structured medium, on engine-derivable composition items. [self-authored/kernel-STYLE/engine-derived-gold rider]

H-M2-NULL (the deflationary alternative, killed or supported symmetrically): any structured-arm advantage is size-indifferent representation formatting or purchased compute; predicts interaction LCBs <= 0 and/or the medium effect within the TTC deflator's reach (K2'). [rider as above]

H-SHRINK (co-primary, the small-model+aligned-authored-store reading): acc(360M, structured medium, verifier on) is non-inferior to acc(1.7B, NL) at the pinned margin at measured cost strictly below the 1.7B-NL cell — the exact contrast f2b-transfer's noninferiority_vs_r3 FAILED without an internal structured medium. [rider as above]

H-M4-STEP (secondary): the step-grain verify-retry loop over the aligned authored store adds accuracy on structured mediums (verifier main effect), more at R2 than R3 (verifier x size interaction) — the f2b loop shape at intermediate-claim grain; the deranged-closure control is expected to collapse the benefit (house expectation, reported-only).

H-ATTR (secondary, deflationary prior DISCLOSED per DECONF-A1/a5/CODEVERT: expected ~0): kernel-grade gloss authoring adds nothing over knull-grade plain typed dialect — TOST within the pinned band kills kernel-content attribution NON-fatally (K3'); the family, if it survives, continues GENERIC and the kernel claim routes to knull-v2/A-F0.
kill_criterion_verbatim: CASC-0' kills (fixed k=2, 300 engine-derived-gold items, 3 seeds, verifier-off interactions primary; every accuracy on the SELF-AUTHORED / kernel-STYLE / engine-derived-gold corpus — rider on every sentence): (K1') the primary size x medium interaction one-sided 95% BCa lower bound <= 0 for BOTH structured mediums AND the co-primary non-inferiority fails (separation gate valid) => M2 is dead at this scope; H-CN is SHELVED; V-DEC/V-LL do NOT unlock; the maintainer's cost goal reverts to the a-e2 prefill-trim upper bound (18.5-41.7%, consumption unmeasured); the kernel-as-internal-language framing of issue #12 reverts to the knull-v2 channel. (K2') the primary rejected but no Holm-passing structured medium beats the cost-matched 360M-NL+TTC deflator (LB <= 0) => the medium effect is purchased compute; treated exactly as K1'. (K3', NON-FATAL) gloss and plain TOST-equivalent within +/-0.05 at R2/verifier-on => kernel-content attribution dead at scope; the family, if any survives, continues as a GENERIC structured cascade and the kernel claim routes to knull-v2/A-F0. NULL requires TOST (both interactions within +/-0.05 of 0). Degeneracy discipline: verifier non-engagement, baseline saturation, missing size separation (for the co-primary only) and TTC cost-mismatch are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates — they can never read as FAIL, PASS, or NULL. No outcome of this experiment is a feasibility conclusion.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions._note: 1.7B revision reused VERBATIM from f2b-transfer/f2b-replicate (backend Modal-smoked there); 360M revision = the standing a5-llm R2 pin; NO PRM, NO tuning (all cells stock)

reuse_overrides.reason: FRESH-RUNS pre-commitment: d-casc0 does not exist in any earlier results log, no prior experiment has run any (arm x rung x medium x verifier) cell of this design, and every endpoint is defined over this record's own paired cells; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with this entry as the recorded decision

runner_constraints.hardware: single GPU (A100-40GB or A10G); image + GPU class pinned inside the harness_manifest staged bytes before any final-phase run
runner_constraints.harness: poc/casc-0 (runner adapted from poc/f2b-transfer/runner/f2bt_runner.py; poc/f2b AND poc/f2b-transfer are left BYTE-IDENTICAL to their pins — new module only). DISCIPLINE: coordinator registers PROPOSED-ASM-1140..1159, prereg-freezes this record, runs reuse-check --gate and records it pre-spend, ops-amends pins.harness_manifest with the printed staged-bytes sha, then mock (green 2026-07-11 on the local box) then dry-plan then the single-GPU final run; auto-authorization under $100 applies ONLY after maintainer sign-off of this design

modal_image_reuse.note: the pinned f2b image reused (PROPOSED-ASM-1153): identical requirements bytes, no new dependency; digest compared at collection in provenance

title: CASC-0' (STATIC-CASE / M2-isolator) — factorial size x medium x verifier probe of the naturalisation bet: does presenting the kernel's AUTHORED content in a structured canonical medium give a SMALLER reasoner (360M) a gain the LARGER one (1.7B) does not share (a positive size x medium interaction, the M2 sign), and can 360M + aligned authored store/checker approach 1.7B-NL (the honest successor to f2b-transfer's FAILED noninferiority_vs_r3, now WITH an internal structured medium)? Adopted verbatim from docs/next/arch/cascade-synthesis.md section 3 (REDESIGN-THEN-DECIDE): 2 sizes x {nl naturalised prose / gloss raw-kernel Option-A / plain distilled typed dialect} x verifier {off, on(structured only)}, scored on the structured core BEFORE any renderer, with a cost-matched 360M-NL+TTC purchased-compute deflator (K2'), a deranged-closure house control, step-grain intermediate-claim verification that NEVER checks the final answer (anti-oracle), and pre-registered kills that shelve H-CN (without unlocking V-DEC/V-LL) if the sign is absent. SELF-AUTHORED / kernel-STYLE / engine-derived-gold rider on every verdict sentence.
